mapper.select: SELECT id, name, floor_num, prison_id, prison_name, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, is_deleted, ground_floor_num, underground_floor_num FROM t_building

select p.id, p.name, p.floor_num floorNum, (select count(*) from t_device de where de.building_id = p.id and de.is_deleted=0) as totalDevices, (select count(*) from t_device de where de.building_id = p.id and de.is_deleted=0 and de.power_off=0) as onlineDevices, (select count(*) from t_device de where de.building_id = p.id and de.is_deleted=0 and de.power_off=1) as offlineDevices, (select count(*) from t_alarm a where a.building_id = p.id and a.is_deleted=0) as totalAlarms from t_building p where p.id = #{id}

SELECT id, name, prison_id FROM t_building
is_deleted = 0
and prison_id in
#{id}
and id = -1
AND ( name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{queryParams.name},'%') )
